title: Kazanlak, Stara Zagora — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Kazanlak, Stara Zagora: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Kazanlak is a city in Stara Zagora with a population of 48,000. The capital of the Rose Valley, famous for its rose oil production, the UNESCO-listed Thracian Tomb of Kazanlak, and the annual Rose Festival.

Last updated: July 14, 2026
